description: Fix all 6 bugs in the AxonRouter combo system: virtual model resolution, edit modal close, comment fix, model validation, create/edit state confusion, and legacy alias removal.
steps: Bug 1 (CRITICAL): In src/sse/handlers/chat.ts, import `isVirtualSystemModel` and `resolveVirtualModelExecution` from `@/lib/routing/virtualModelResolver`. Before the `getComboModels(effectiveModelStr)` call (around line 148 where `const comboObject = await getComboModels(effectiveModelStr)` is), add virtual model resolution: check `isVirtualSystemModel(effectiveModelStr)`, if true call `resolveVirtualModelExecution({ modelStr: effectiveModelStr, settings })`, if result is non-null set `requestContext.virtualResolution = resolution` and reassign `effectiveModelStr` to `resolution.selectedCombo`. Change `const effectiveModelStr = modelStr;` to `let effectiveModelStr = modelStr;` to allow reassignment.

Bug 2 (HIGH): In src/app/(dashboard)/app/combos/page.tsx, in `saveComboMutation.onSuccess` (around line 579), add `setShowEditModal(false)` after `setShowComboEditor(false)` so the edit modal closes after saving.

Bug 3 (LOW): In open-sse/services/combo.tsx, fix the misleading comment on `getRotatedModels` function (around line 96). The current comment says 'Uses atomic counter increment to prevent race conditions across async boundaries.' Change it to accurately reflect that the counter is safe within synchronous execution (single-threaded Node.js) but not truly atomic across await boundaries. Also fix the comment on the `comboRotationState` Map (around line 13) from 'Uses a monotonic counter for atomicity across async boundaries.' to something accurate like 'Uses a monotonic counter; safe within synchronous sections of single-threaded Node.js.'

Bug 4 (MEDIUM): In src/sse/handlers/chat.ts, in BOTH `isModelAvailable` callbacks (one in `handleChat` around line 170 and one in `handleSingleModelChat` around line 230), add an early check: if `candidateModel` is empty or does not contain a `/` character, return `false` instead of the default `true`. This prevents broken model strings from passing the pre-filter.

Bug 5 (MEDIUM): In src/app/(dashboard)/app/combos/page.tsx: (a) In `startCreate()`, add `setShowEditModal(false)` to close any open edit modal. (b) In `startEdit()`, add `setSaving(false)` to clear any stale saving state. (c) Create a dedicated `editComboMutation` (using useMutation) that handles edit-specific cleanup - its `onSuccess` should call `invalidateCombos()`, `setShowEditModal(false)`, `setComboEditorError('')`, and `resetBuilder()`. Its `onError` should call `setComboEditorError(error.message)`. Its `onSettled` should call `setSaving(false)`. Then update `handleEditSave` to call `editComboMutation.mutate(...)` instead of `saveComboMutation.mutate(...)`.

Bug 6 (LOW): In src/sse/handlers/chat.ts, remove legacy alias reads in BOTH handleComboChat call sites. Change `const comboSpecificStrategy = comboConfig.strategy || comboConfig.fallbackStrategy;` to `const comboSpecificStrategy = comboConfig.strategy;`. Change `const comboStickyLimit = comboConfig.stickyLimit || comboConfig.stickyRoundRobinLimit || comboObject?.config?.stickyLimit || routing.stickyLimit || settings.stickyRoundRobinLimit || 1;` to `const comboStickyLimit = comboConfig.stickyLimit || comboObject?.config?.stickyLimit || routing.stickyLimit || 1;`. This applies to both the call in handleChat (around line 155) and the call in handleSingleModelChat (around line 220). Remove `settings.comboStrategy` fallback too - change `routing.comboStrategy || settings.comboStrategy || comboObject.strategy` to `routing.comboStrategy || comboObject.strategy`.
acceptance_criteria: Virtual models (auto/economy/premium/balanced) resolve to actual combos before the getComboModels call in handleChat
The edit modal closes after a successful save via saveComboMutation or the new editComboMutation
The comboRotationState comment accurately describes thread-safety without claiming atomicity across async boundaries
Empty or slash-less model strings return false from isModelAvailable in both combo handler call sites
startCreate closes the edit modal, startEdit resets saving state, and edit saves use a dedicated mutation
Legacy aliases (fallbackStrategy, stickyRoundRobinLimit, settings.comboStrategy, settings.stickyRoundRobinLimit) are no longer read at runtime in chat.ts
verification: Run `npx vitest run --reporter=verbose --root tests` and confirm all tests pass
Run `npx tsc --noEmit` (typecheck) and confirm no type errors
